zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Stewart於1424年出生在蘇格蘭費伏金加迪時，他的父親Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan74歲，母親Janett Semphill55歲。他於大約1445年與Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Stewart于1424年出生在苏格兰費伏金加迪时，他的父亲Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan74岁，母亲Janett Semphill55岁。他于大约1445年与Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Stewart was born in 1424, in Kincardine, Fife, Scotland, his father, Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan, was 74 and his mother, Janett Semphill, was 55. He married Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany about 1445. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Stewart est né en 1424, à Kincardine, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Janett Semphill, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany environ 1445. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Stewart 1424 in Kincardine, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan 74 und seine Mutter Janett Semphill 55. Er hat um 1445 Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart è nato il nel 1424 nel Kincardine, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan, aveva 74 anni e il suo madre, Janett Semphill, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany circa 1445. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 89 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart(이)가 1424년 스컷랜드 피프 킨카딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan(은)는 74세였고, 그의 어머니 Janett Semphill(은)는 55세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Stewart родился в 1424 г. в местности кинкардаин, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Janett Semphill, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany около 1445 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Stewart nació en 1424, en Kincardine, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan, tenía 74 años y su mamá, Janett Semphill, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Lady Boyd, Duchess of Albany aproximadamente 1445. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años.
